title: Fun Time 55920 Push Along Alphabet Train, 35cm x 25cm x 6cm
features: Suitable for age 12 months and upwards
Complete lower case alphabet with extra vowel letters
description: Product Description This multi-coloured push along alphabet train from Fun Time makes an ideal choice for your young toddler. It’s educational, sturdy and the fun and games never stop. Link together the carriages and loco and have fun pushing the train along. Spell out your own name using the letters and slot them in the carriages - a complete alphabet with extra vowels. We can’t promise that the Fun Time range of toys will make your child a genius, but they will certainly stimulate their senses and help to develop their skills. There’s only one word for the push along alphabet train and that word is “fun”. this product conforms to EN71 and the toy safety Directive. PLEASE remove all packaging before giving it to your child. This toy is suitable for age 12 months and upwards. Safety Warning No applicable warnings Box Contains 1 x Push Along Train See more
